# discord_role (Data Source)

Fetches information about a Discord role by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the role.
- `server_id` (String) ID of the server (guild) the role belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `color` (Number) RGB color value.
- `hoist` (Boolean) Whether members are displayed separately from online members.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the role is managed by an integration (bot role, etc.).
- `mentionable` (Boolean) Whether the role can be mentioned by members.
- `name` (String) Role name.
- `permissions` (String) Bitwise permission integer.
- `position` (Number) Position of the role in the role list (higher = higher in the list).
